description_long: This modern bungalow features a flat roof and a two-story layout with a mix of light gray brick and wood paneling on the exterior. Large, rectangular windows dominate the facade, providing ample natural light to the interior spaces. The property is surrounded by a wooden fence and landscaped with several mature trees and green lawns, including a backyard with a patio area and outdoor furniture. The front of the house includes a driveway with a carport and a main entrance accentuated by vertical wood panels. The backyard features a small shed and a lounge chair, while the patio is equipped for outdoor dining. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a strong connection between indoor and outdoor living areas.
description: A modern, two-story bungalow with flat roofs, large windows, wood and brick exterior, surrounded by landscaped gardens and a wooden fence.
description_view_0: Side view showing the brick facade, large windows, and a section of the backyard with trees and a lawn.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard, patio dining area, shed, and extensive window arrangement.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a clear look at the patio, outdoor dining area, and the main living spaces opening to the backyard.
description_view_3: Front view featuring the driveway, carport, main entrance with wood paneling, and symmetrical landscaping with trees.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on multiple facades
